forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers after 2am. Cloudy. Low around 50, with temperatures rising to around 52 overnight. East wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 8am, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 59, with temperatures falling to around 57 in the afternoon. East wind 12 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

forecast.name: Saturday Night
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 11pm. Cloudy. Low around 52, with temperatures rising to around 55 overnight. South southeast wind 2 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Rain Showers
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after 1pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 76. Southwest wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 8pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. West southwest wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
